filediff.before:
#!/bin/bash

# Custom git command to add, commit, and push all changes
# Usage: git quickpush "commit message"

if [ $# -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Error: Please provide a commit message"
    echo "Usage: git quickpush \"your commit message\""
    exit 1
fi

# Add all changes
git add .

# Commit with the provided message
git commit -m "$1"

# Push to remote (if remote exists)
if git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then
    git push origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    echo "✓ Changes added, committed, and pushed successfully!"
else
    echo "✓ Changes added and committed successfully!"
    echo "ℹ No remote repository found. Set up a remote with: git remote add origin <repository-url>"
fi
filediff.after:
#!/bin/bash

# Custom git command to add, commit, and push all changes
# Usage: git quickpush "commit message"

if [ $# -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Error: Please provide a commit message"
    echo "Usage: git quickpush \"your commit message\""
    exit 1
fi

# Add only relevant project files (exclude cache, node_modules, etc.)
git add *.md *.txt *.py *.js *.html *.css *.json *.sh *.png *.jpg *.gif
git add backend/ frontend/ training/ uploads/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Commit with the provided message
git commit -m "$1"

# Push to remote (if remote exists)
if git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then
    git push origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    echo "✓ Changes added, committed, and pushed successfully!"
else
    echo "✓ Changes added and committed successfully!"
    echo "ℹ No remote repository found. Set up a remote with: git remote add origin <repository-url>"
fi
